# Tamgur AI API Platform

> Tamgur provides stable, pay-as-you-go access to genuine Claude, GPT-5, Codex and Gemini models through one unified, OpenAI-compatible API.

Canonical website: https://api.tamgur.tech/home/index.html
API documentation: https://doc.tamgur.tech/
API base URL: https://api.tamgur.tech/v1
Account dashboard: https://api.tamgur.tech/dashboard/models

## Key facts

- Tamgur is an independent managed AI API platform.
- Models are sourced from their original providers without intentional model substitution or capability downgrades.
- Pricing is pay as you go, with no monthly subscription required.
- The standard global offer is $2.99 for $10 of API usage measured against each provider's published official API pricing.
- A Tamgur balance is not an official provider gift card.
- Supported provider groups include Claude, OpenAI and Codex, and Gemini.
- The API is designed to be compatible with OpenAI-style integrations.
- Customer requests are isolated and are not shared with other customers.
- Activation is usually completed within seconds after payment.

## Intended users

Tamgur is designed for developers, startups, AI builders and students who need lower-cost access to multiple leading AI models.

## Languages

The website is available in English, Simplified Chinese, French, Russian, Japanese and Vietnamese.

## Important links

- Homepage: https://api.tamgur.tech/home/index.html
- Documentation: https://doc.tamgur.tech/
- API reference: https://api.tamgur.tech/docs/api
- Codex guide: https://api.tamgur.tech/docs/codex
- Add API balance: https://api.tamgur.tech/wallet
